processes.name: Order (no refund)
failure_list: two payments for the same order succeed
the sum of debit ledger entries does not equal the sum of credit ledger entries for a single transaction
all processed_payments (payment-api) have equivalent step2a_payin-complete Transactions in the ledger db
all processed_payouts (payout-api) have equivalent step4_payout-received Transactions in the ledger db
constraint_list: checkout is only ever called for an order that exists
all sellers need an Account (see the rules for seeding the ledger db for the proper seller account entry)
items must have a seller_id that exists in the Account database
all items in an order must have the same seller_id

for client.shipOrder get read the PayoutReadiness table and for payment_order_id. if PayoutReadiness.fufilled is true then skip. if there is a Transaction(payment_order_id, step: refund) then skip that entry. grab the current entries that have fulfilled equal to false, use that payment_order_id to get the corresponding Order in the Order DB and use that as the argument.
